<p align="center">
<a href="https://github.com/wongzit/icssgen"> <img alt="icssgen" class="icon" src="/assets/program/ICSSgen_icon.png" style="height:66px; background-color:transparent;"></a>
</p>

![](https://img.shields.io/github/repo-size/wongzit/icssgen?style=for-the-badge)&ensp;![forthebadge](https://forthebadge.com/images/badges/made-with-python.svg)&ensp;![forthebadge](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)


- A Python program of **input file generator for 2D-ICSS (2D-NICS) calculations**, released on **19th April 2021**.
- Supports **macOS**, **Linux** and **Microsoft Windows**.
- User manual, source code and executable files are free available from [**GitHub**](https://github.com/wongzit/icssgen).

<br />

<p align="center">
<a href="https://github.com/wongzit/icssgen"> <img alt="icssgen" class="icon" src="/assets/program/ICSSgen_icon.png" style="height:66px; background-color:transparent;"></a>
</p>

- An **input file generator for 2D-ICSS (2D-NICS) calculations**, released on **19th April 2021**.
- Supports **macOS**, **Linux** and **Microsoft Windows**.
- User manual, source code and executable files are free available from [**GitHub**](https://github.com/wongzit/icssgen).
